certified_scope: Real CLI conversation executed with OpenAI-backed OCS cognition
Workflow selection, provider invocation, cognition artifact creation, replay creation, and turn completion verified
Governance and provider non-authority boundaries verified
non_certified_scope: Canonical recovery of section-labeled plain text cognition embedded inside Findings

certification_decision.reason: The real provider path completed, but operator cognition output is only partially structured. Assumptions, risks, and uncertainties remained empty while corresponding content was embedded inside a single Findings text item.

required_follow_up.recommended_runtime_fix: Add bounded normalization for section-labeled plain text cognition embedded inside a finding item, without parsing raw provider payloads directly and without changing provider authority.
